note: Simplified LCD coverage rules derived from CMS Medicare Coverage Database. Covers high-frequency codes in the procedure weight pool. Extend with real LCD data when available.

27447.coverage_note: Requires primary OA (M17), hip OA (M16), or mechanical joint derangement. Psychiatric, metabolic-only, or infectious diagnoses without joint pathology do not support medical necessity.

29827.coverage_note: Requires rotator cuff tear (M75.1), impingement (M75.0), or shoulder trauma (S40/S46). Non-musculoskeletal diagnoses alone do not support medical necessity.

29823.coverage_note: Requires shoulder pathology diagnosis. Bundled with 29827 under NCCI when performed in same operative session.

27446.coverage_note: Requires medial or lateral compartment OA or joint pathology. Full knee replacement (27447) is the inclusive code when total replacement performed.

43239.coverage_note: Requires GI indication: GERD (K21), gastritis (K29), diverticulosis (K57), GI bleed (K92), abdominal pain with GI context (R10), peptic ulcer (K25-K27), esophageal disease (K22). Bundled with 43235 under NCCI.

43235.coverage_note: Requires GI indication. Bundled with 43239 under NCCI (included in biopsy code).

93000.coverage_note: Requires cardiac indication: cardiac disease (I-codes), arrhythmia (R00), murmur (R01), chest pain (R07), cardiac screening (Z01.810, Z03.89). Non-cardiac diagnoses without co-morbid cardiac condition are not supported.

93005.coverage_note: Technical component of ECG. Bundled with 93000 under NCCI when interpretation is billed by same provider on same day.

20610.coverage_note: Requires joint pathology diagnosis: OA (M17), RA (M06/M05), joint pain (M79/M25). Non-articular diagnoses do not support medical necessity.

99213.procedure_name: Office visit, established patient, moderate complexity
99213.coverage_note: Broadly covered. No specific diagnosis restriction for office E&M visits. Level of service must match documented complexity.

99214.procedure_name: Office visit, established patient, high complexity
99214.coverage_note: Broadly covered. Level-of-service documentation must support high MDM or time-based billing.

99212.procedure_name: Office visit, established patient, low complexity

99215.procedure_name: Office visit, established patient, very high complexity
99215.coverage_note: Broadly covered. Very high MDM or 55+ minutes required.

85025.coverage_note: Broadly covered for diagnostic CBC. No specific diagnosis exclusions.

80053.coverage_note: Broadly covered for metabolic monitoring. No specific exclusions.

36415.coverage_note: Broadly covered. No specific diagnosis requirement.

11042.coverage_note: Requires wound or ulcer diagnosis: pressure ulcer (L89), diabetic wound (E11.6/E10.6), non-pressure ulcer (L97/L98). Routine wound care on intact skin is not covered.

90837.coverage_note: Requires documented psychiatric/behavioral health diagnosis (F-code). Cannot be billed without a qualifying mental health diagnosis.

99232.coverage_note: Broadly covered for inpatient follow-up. Place of service must be 21 (inpatient).

99233.coverage_note: Broadly covered for inpatient follow-up with high complexity. Place of service must be 21 (inpatient).

99285.coverage_note: Broadly covered for ED visits. Place of service must be 23 (emergency room).
